## Testing

- [ ] `./gradlew assembleRelease`

## Risk

- [ ] Touches Android control
- [ ] Touches agent/tool execution
- [ ] Touches approvals/security policy
- [ ] Touches local inference/runtime
- [ ] Touches persisted data/secrets
- [ ] Touches UI
- [ ] Docs only

## Screenshots / Traces
